option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=0.5">
    <title>Jushi Egypt — Transport Portal</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    <style>
        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       DESIGN TOKENS
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        :root {
            --bg:        #F7F8FA;
            --surface:   #FFFFFF;
            --surface2:  #F0F2F5;
            --border:    #E4E7EC;
            --border2:   #D0D5DD;
            --text:      #0F1623;
            --text2:     #4A5568;
            --text3:     #8F9BB3;
            --blue:      #1B5FAD;
            --blue-soft: #EBF2FC;
            --red:       #CC1F26;
            --red-soft:  #FCEAEA;
            --green:     #12A150;
            --green-soft:#E6F7EE;
            --amber:     #D97706;
            --amber-soft:#FEF3C7;
            --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,22,35,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,22,35,0.04);
            --shadow:    0 4px 12px rgba(15,22,35,0.08), 0 2px 4px rgba(15,22,35,0.04);
            --shadow-lg: 0 12px 40px rgba(15,22,35,0.1), 0 4px 12px rgba(15,22,35,0.06);
            --radius:    12px;
            --radius-lg: 18px;
            --radius-xl: 24px;
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       RESET & BASE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        *, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }

        body {
            font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg);
            color: var(--text);
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       LOADER
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #loader {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 99999;
            background: #fff;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 20px;
            transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
        }
        .loader-bar-track {
            width: 200px; height: 2px;
            background: var(--border); border-radius: 99px; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .loader-bar-fill {
            height: 100%; width: 0%; border-radius: 99px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--blue), var(--red));
            animation: loadBar 2.5s ease-out forwards;
        }
        @keyframes loadBar { to { width: 90%; } }
        #loader p {
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: var(--text3); text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       LOGIN SCREEN
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #login-overlay {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 9999;
            background: var(--bg);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            padding: 24px;
        }

        /* Decorative background grid */
        #login-overlay::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute; inset: 0;
            background-image:
                    linear-gradient(rgba(27,95,173,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
                    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(27,95,173,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 48px 48px;
            mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%, black 30%, transparent 100%);
        }

        /* Accent blobs */
        #login-overlay::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 600px; height: 600px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(27,95,173,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
            top: -100px; right: -100px; pointer-events: none;
        }

        .login-wrap {
            position: relative; z-index: 1;
            display: flex; align-items: stretch;
            gap: 0;
            background: var(--surface);
            border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg), 0 0 0 1px var(--border);
            overflow: hidden;
            max-width: 860px; width: 100%;
        }

        /* Left panel */
        .login-left {
            flex: 1; padding: 52px 44px;
            background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0F1E3D 0%, #1a2f5e 50%, #0d1a38 100%);
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative; overflow: hidden; min-width: 340px;
        }
        .login-left::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute; inset: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(204,31,38,0.18) 0%, transparent 60%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(27,95,173,0.25) 0%, transparent 60%);
        }
        .login-left-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

        .login-brand {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 48px;
        }
        .login-brand img { height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; }
        .login-brand-name {
            font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .login-brand-sub {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
            letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px;
        }

        .login-headline {
            font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
            line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .login-headline span {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7EAEE8, #E8909A);
            -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }
        .login-tagline {
            font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); line-height: 1.7;
            max-width: 280px;
        }

        .login-modules { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
        .login-module {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
            padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 10px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }
        .login-module:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); }
        .login-module-icon {
            width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px;
        }
        .login-module-name {
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }
        .login-module-desc { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); margin-top: 1px; }

        /* Right panel — form */
        .login-right {
            width: 360px; flex-shrink: 0;
            padding: 52px 44px;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
        }

        .login-form-header { margin-bottom: 36px; }
        .login-form-title {
            font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        .login-form-sub { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text3); }

        .lf { margin-bottom: 18px; }
        .lf label {
            display: block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--text2); margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .lf input {
            width: 100%; padding: 11px 14px; border-radius: 10px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px;
            outline: none; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .lf input:focus {
            border-color: var(--blue); background: #fff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(27,95,173,0.1);
        }
        .lf input::placeholder { color: var(--text3); }

        .login-submit {
            width: 100%; padding: 13px; margin-top: 6px;
            border-radius: 10px; border: none; cursor: pointer;
            background: var(--text);
            color: #fff; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.18s; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .login-submit::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute; inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(27,95,173,0.9), rgba(204,31,38,0.9));
            opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s;
        }
        .login-submit:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
        .login-submit span { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
        .login-submit:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: var(--shadow); }
        .login-submit:active { transform: translateY(0); }

        .login-error {
            margin-top: 14px; padding: 11px 14px; border-radius: 8px;
            background: var(--red-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.2);
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--red);
            display: none;
        }

        .login-footer {
            margin-top: 32px; padding-top: 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
        }
        .login-footer-dot {
            width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green);
            animation: pulse2 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse2 { 0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)} 50%{opacity:0.5;transform:scale(0.8)} }
        .login-footer-text { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       HEADER
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        header {
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 20px;
            background: var(--surface);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            height: 56px; flex-shrink: 0; z-index: 9999;
        }
        header.hidden { display: none; }

        .logo {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .logo img { height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; }
        .logo-name {
            font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text);
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        }
        .logo-divider {
            width: 1px; height: 16px; background: var(--border2); margin: 0 4px;
        }
        .logo-context {
            font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text3);
        }

        /* Nav tabs */
        .nav-tabs {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px;
            background: var(--surface2); padding: 3px; border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .nav-tab {
            padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.03em; color: var(--text3);
            background: transparent; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .nav-tab:hover:not(.active) { color: var(--text2); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.03); }
        .nav-tab.active {
            background: var(--surface); color: var(--text);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        /* Header right */
        .header-right {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .header-status {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
            font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3);
        }
        .header-status-dot {
            width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green);
            animation: pulse2 2s infinite;
        }
        .header-user {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
            padding: 4px 10px 4px 4px; border-radius: 20px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .header-avatar {
            width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--red));
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .header-uname { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
        .header-signout-btn {
            width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface2);
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            color: var(--text3); transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .header-signout-btn:hover { background: var(--red-soft); border-color: rgba(204,31,38,0.3); color: var(--red); }
        .header-signout-btn svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }
        .header-refresh-btn {
            width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface2);
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            color: var(--text3); transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .header-refresh-btn:hover { background: var(--blue-soft); border-color: rgba(27,95,173,0.3); color: var(--blue); }
        .header-refresh-btn svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }
        .header-refresh-btn.spinning svg { animation: spinRefresh 0.7s linear infinite; }
        @keyframes spinRefresh { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       PAGE SYSTEM
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        .page { display: none; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; flex-direction: column; }
        .page.active { display: flex; }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       MAP PAGE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        .main-content {
            display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden;
            padding: 12px 12px 0 12px; gap: 10px;
        }

        #sidebar {
            width: 180px; flex-shrink: 0;
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }
        .sidebar-title {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--text3); padding: 16px 16px 10px;
        }
        .sidebar-item {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
            padding: 9px 16px; cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s; border-left: 2px solid transparent;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .sidebar-item:hover { background: var(--surface2); }
        .sidebar-item.active { background: var(--blue-soft); border-left-color: var(--blue); }
        .sidebar-item.hidden-route { opacity: 0.35; }
        .sidebar-dot {
            width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .sidebar-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); flex: 1; }
        .sidebar-toggle {
            margin-left: auto; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%;
            border: 1.5px solid var(--border2);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 9px; color: var(--text3); transition: all 0.15s; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .sidebar-item.active .sidebar-toggle {
            border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); background: rgba(27,95,173,0.1);
        }
        .sidebar-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 4px 12px; }
        .sidebar-stops-count { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 1px; }

        #map {
            flex: 1; min-width: 0; z-index: 1;
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg); overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }
        .leaflet-container { background: #eef1f5 !important; border-radius: var(--radius-lg); }

        .custom-tooltip {
            background: var(--surface) !important;
            border: 1px solid var(--border) !important;
            border-radius: 10px !important; color: var(--text) !important;
            font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif !important;
            font-size: 12px !important; padding: 10px 14px !important;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow) !important; min-width: 160px;
        }
        .custom-tooltip::before { display: none !important; }
        .tt-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .tt-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; color: var(--text3); font-size: 11px; margin-top: 3px; }
        .tt-row span:last-child { color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; }
        .route-tooltip {
            background: var(--surface) !important; border: 1px solid var(--border) !important;
            border-radius: 8px !important; color: var(--text) !important;
            font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif !important; font-size: 11px !important;
            padding: 6px 10px !important; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm) !important;
        }
        .route-tooltip::before { display: none !important; }

        /* Stats bar */
        #stats {
            display: flex; gap: 0; flex-shrink: 0;
            margin: 10px 12px 12px; border-radius: var(--radius);
            background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); overflow: hidden;
        }
        .stat {
            flex: 1; padding: 12px 20px;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px;
        }
        .stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
        .stat-label {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3);
        }
        .stat-value {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px;
            color: var(--text);
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       ANALYTICS PAGE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #analytics-page { display: none; flex: 1; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; }
        #analytics-page.active { display: flex; }

        .analytics-layout {
            display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden;
            padding: 12px; gap: 10px;
        }

        .analytics-sidebar {
            width: 220px; flex-shrink: 0;
            background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg); display: flex;
            flex-direction: column; overflow-y: auto;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }
        .analytics-sidebar-title {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text3); padding: 16px 16px 10px;
        }
        .analytics-user-badge {
            margin: 0 10px 12px; background: var(--surface2);
            border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 12px;
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .analytics-user-avatar {
            width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--red));
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .analytics-user-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
        .analytics-user-role { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); }

        .route-selector-item {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 14px;
            cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; border-left: 2px solid transparent;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .route-selector-item:hover { background: var(--surface2); }
        .route-selector-item.selected { background: var(--blue-soft); border-left-color: var(--blue); }
        .route-selector-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .route-selector-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); }
        .route-selector-pax { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 1px; }

        .logout-btn {
            margin: 12px; padding: 9px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
            background: var(--surface2); color: var(--text3); font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s;
            margin-top: auto; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .logout-btn:hover { background: var(--red-soft); border-color: rgba(204,31,38,0.3); color: var(--red); }

        .analytics-main {
            flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 24px;
            background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        .analytics-route-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .analytics-route-color-bar { width: 4px; height: 44px; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .analytics-route-name { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
        .analytics-route-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 3px; }

        /* KPI Cards */
        .kpi-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        .kpi-card {
            background: var(--surface2); border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 18px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .kpi-label {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3); margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .kpi-value {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 26px; color: var(--text);
        }
        .kpi-sub { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 4px; }
        .kpi-bar { height: 2px; border-radius: 99px; margin-top: 12px; background: var(--border); overflow: hidden; }
        .kpi-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 99px; }

        /* Charts */
        .charts-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .chart-card {
            background: var(--surface2); border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 18px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .chart-card-full { grid-column: 1/-1; }
        .chart-title {
            font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text2);
            margin-bottom: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        canvas { max-height: 200px; }

        /* Stops table */
        .stops-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
        .stops-table th {
            text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: var(--text3); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .stops-table td {
            padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .stops-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
        .stops-table tr:hover td { background: var(--surface2); }
        .stop-index {
            width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%;
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
        }
        .stop-name-cell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
        .pax-bar-cell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
        .pax-mini-bar { flex: 1; height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 99px; overflow: hidden; max-width: 80px; }
        .pax-mini-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 99px; }

        /* Route comparison table */
        .route-comparison-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
        .route-comparison-table th {
            text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: var(--text3); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .route-comparison-table td {
            padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .route-comparison-table tr:hover td { background: var(--surface2); }
        .route-comparison-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
        .route-name-cell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
        .route-color-pill { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .pax-bar-overview { flex: 1; height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 99px; overflow: hidden; max-width: 100px; }
        .rank-badge {
            width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%;
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
        }

        /* Empty / loading states */
        .analytics-empty {
            flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px;
            color: var(--text3); text-align: center;
        }
        .analytics-empty-icon { font-size: 40px; opacity: 0.3; }
        .analytics-empty-text { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text2); }
        .analytics-empty-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); }

        /* Overview */
        .overview-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .overview-title { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
        .overview-subtitle { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 3px; }
        .overview-icon {
            width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--red));
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       PASSENGERS PAGE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #passengers-page { display: none; flex: 1; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; }
        #passengers-page.active { display: flex; }

        .pass-layout { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px; gap: 10px; }

        .pass-sidebar {
            width: 200px; flex-shrink: 0;
            background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg); display: flex;
            flex-direction: column; overflow-y: auto;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        .pass-main {
            flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 24px;
            background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        .pass-toolbar {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 18px; flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .pass-search-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1; min-width: 200px; }
        .pass-search-wrap input {
            width: 100%; padding: 9px 14px 9px 36px; border-radius: 9px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px;
            outline: none; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .pass-search-wrap input:focus { border-color: var(--blue); background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(27,95,173,0.08); }
        .pass-search-wrap input::placeholder { color: var(--text3); }
        .pass-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 11px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text3); font-size: 14px; pointer-events: none; }
        .pass-filter-select {
            padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 9px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px;
            outline: none; cursor: pointer; min-width: 130px; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .pass-filter-select:focus { border-color: var(--blue); }
        .pass-count-badge {
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text3); font-size: 12px; padding: 6px 12px;
            border-radius: 8px; white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .pass-count-badge strong { color: var(--text); }

        /* KPI strip */
        .pass-kpi-strip { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
        .pass-kpi {
            background: var(--surface2); border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 16px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .pass-kpi-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3); margin-bottom: 5px; }
        .pass-kpi-value { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 22px; color: var(--text); }

        /* Table */
        .pass-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .pass-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; min-width: 560px; }
        .pass-table th {
            text-align: left; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3);
            background: var(--surface2); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 2;
        }
        .pass-table th:first-child { border-radius: 10px 0 0 0; }
        .pass-table th:last-child  { border-radius: 0 10px 0 0; }
        .pass-table td {
            padding: 11px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface);
        }
        .pass-table tr:hover td { background: var(--surface2); }
        .pass-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }

        .pass-id-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--blue-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(27,95,173,0.2);
            color: var(--blue); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-weight: 500; font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 9px;
            border-radius: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
        }
        .pass-dept-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--red-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.2);
            color: var(--red); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
            padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px;
        }
        .pass-shift-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--green-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(18,161,80,0.2);
            color: var(--green); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
            padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px;
        }
        .pass-no-results {
            text-align: center; padding: 48px 24px; color: var(--text3); font-size: 14px;
            background: var(--surface2); border-radius: 8px; margin-top: 4px;
        }

        /* ── SHIFT MULTI-SELECT FILTER ─────────────────────────────── */
        .shift-filter-wrap {
            position: relative;
        }
        .shift-filter-btn {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
            padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 9px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: all 0.18s;
            min-width: 150px; justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .shift-filter-btn:hover { border-color: var(--blue); background: #fff; }
        .shift-filter-btn.active { border-color: var(--blue); background: var(--blue-soft); color: var(--blue); }
        .shift-filter-btn .shift-filter-arrow { font-size: 9px; transition: transform 0.2s; }
        .shift-filter-btn.open .shift-filter-arrow { transform: rotate(180deg); }
        .shift-filter-badge {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            min-width: 18px; height: 18px; padding: 0 5px;
            background: var(--blue); color: #fff;
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 99px;
        }
        .shift-dropdown {
            position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 6px); left: 0; z-index: 999;
            background: var(--surface); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
            min-width: 220px; padding: 8px 0;
            display: none;
        }
        .shift-dropdown.open { display: block; animation: fadeDown 0.15s ease; }
        @keyframes fadeDown { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-6px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
        .shift-dropdown-header {
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 6px 14px 10px;
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        .shift-dropdown-header button {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--blue);
            background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 0;
            font-family: inherit;
        }
        .shift-option {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
            padding: 8px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s;
            font-size: 13px; color: var(--text);
        }
        .shift-option:hover { background: var(--surface2); }
        .shift-option input[type="checkbox"] {
            width: 15px; height: 15px; accent-color: var(--blue);
            cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .shift-option-label { flex: 1; }
        .shift-option-count {
            font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3);
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
        }

        /* Line selector */
        .pass-line-item {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 14px;
            cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; border-left: 2px solid transparent;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .pass-line-item:hover { background: var(--surface2); }
        .pass-line-item.selected { background: var(--blue-soft); border-left-color: var(--blue); }
        .pass-line-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .pass-line-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); }
        .pass-line-count { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 1px; }

        /* Spinner (inline) */
        .loader-ring {
            width: 20px; height: 20px; border: 2px solid var(--border);
            border-top-color: var(--blue); border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.7s linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

        /* Entrance animations */
        @keyframes fadeUp {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }
        .login-wrap { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease both; }
        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       MANAGEMENT PAGE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #manage-page { display:none; flex:1; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden; }
        #manage-page.active { display:flex; }

        .manage-layout { display:flex; flex:1; overflow:hidden; padding:12px; gap:10px; }

        /* Left panel — sub tabs */
        .manage-sidebar {
            width:200px; flex-shrink:0;
            background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:var(--radius-lg); display:flex; flex-direction:column;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm); overflow:hidden;
        }
        .manage-sidebar-title {
            font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.1em;
            text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text3); padding:16px 16px 10px;
            border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .manage-nav-item {
            display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:12px 16px;
            cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.15s; border-left:2px solid transparent;
            user-select:none;
        }
        .manage-nav-item:hover { background:var(--surface2); }
        .manage-nav-item.active { background:var(--blue-soft); border-left-color:var(--blue); }
        .manage-nav-icon { font-size:16px; flex-shrink:0; }
        .manage-nav-label { font-size:13px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text); }
        .manage-nav-sub { font-size:10px; color:var(--text3); margin-top:1px; }

        /* Main panel */
        .manage-main {
            flex:1; overflow-y:auto;
            background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:var(--radius-lg); box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        /* Section header */
        .manage-section-header {
            display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
            padding:20px 24px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
            position:sticky; top:0; background:var(--surface); z-index:10;
        }
        .manage-section-title { font-size:16px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
        .manage-section-sub { font-size:12px; color:var(--text3); margin-top:2px; }

        /* Buttons */
        .btn {
            display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
            padding:8px 16px; border-radius:8px; border:none; cursor:pointer;
            font-family:inherit; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
            transition:all 0.18s; white-space:nowrap;
        }
        .btn-primary { background:var(--blue); color:#fff; }
        .btn-primary:hover { background:#1650a0; transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:var(--shadow); }
        .btn-danger { background:var(--red-soft); color:var(--red); border:1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.2); }
        .btn-danger:hover { background:var(--red); color:#fff; }
        .btn-ghost { background:var(--surface2); color:var(--text2); border:1px solid var(--border); }
        .btn-ghost:hover { background:var(--border); }
        .btn-success { background:var(--green-soft); color:var(--green); border:1px solid rgba(18,161,80,0.2); }
        .btn-success:hover { background:var(--green); color:#fff; }
        .btn-sm { padding:5px 10px; font-size:11px; }

        /* Table inside manage */
        .manage-table-wrap { padding:0 24px 24px; }
        .manage-table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; margin-top:16px; }
        .manage-table th {
            text-align:left; padding:10px 12px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700;
            text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:var(--text3);
            background:var(--surface2); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .manage-table th:first-child { border-radius:8px 0 0 8px; }
        .manage-table th:last-child  { border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; }
        .manage-table td {
            padding:11px 12px; font-size:13px; color:var(--text);
            border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); vertical-align:middle;
        }
        .manage-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom:none; }
        .manage-table tr:hover td { background:var(--surface2); }
        .manage-table .actions { display:flex; gap:6px; }

        /* Color swatch */
        .color-swatch {
            width:20px; height:20px; border-radius:50%;
            display:inline-block; border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            vertical-align:middle; margin-right:8px;
        }

        /* Modal */
        .modal-backdrop {
            position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(15,22,35,0.45);
            z-index:99998; display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
            backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
        }
        .modal-backdrop.open { display:flex; }
        .modal {
            background:var(--surface); border-radius:var(--radius-xl);
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg); width:100%; max-width:480px;
            margin:24px; animation:fadeUp 0.25s ease both;
            border:1px solid var(--border); overflow:hidden;
        }
        .modal-header {
            padding:20px 24px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
            display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
        }
        .modal-title { font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
        .modal-close {
            width:28px; height:28px; border-radius:7px; border:1px solid var(--border);
            background:var(--surface2); cursor:pointer; display:flex;
            align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:14px; color:var(--text3);
            transition:all 0.15s;
        }
        .modal-close:hover { background:var(--red-soft); color:var(--red); border-color:rgba(204,31,38,0.2); }
        .modal-body { padding:24px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; }
        .modal-footer {
            padding:16px 24px; border-top:1px solid var(--border);
            display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:8px;
            background:var(--surface2);
        }

        /* Form fields inside modal */
        .field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; }
        .field label { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.06em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text2); }
        .field input, .field select, .field textarea {
            padding:10px 12px; border-radius:9px;
            background:var(--surface2); border:1.5px solid var(--border);
            color:var(--text); font-family:inherit; font-size:13px;
            outline:none; transition:all 0.18s;
        }
        .field input:focus, .field select:focus, .field textarea:focus {
            border-color:var(--blue); background:#fff;
            box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(27,95,173,0.08);
        }
        .field-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; }

        /* Toast notification */
        .toast {
            position:fixed; bottom:24px; right:24px; z-index:99999;
            background:var(--text); color:#fff; padding:12px 18px;
            border-radius:10px; font-size:13px; font-weight:500;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg); display:none; align-items:center; gap:10px;
            animation:fadeUp 0.3s ease;
        }
        .toast.show { display:flex; }
        .toast.success { background:var(--green); }
        .toast.error   { background:var(--red); }

        /* Loading state for buttons */
        .btn.loading { opacity:0.7; pointer-events:none; }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       GEOJSON ROUTE MODAL
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        .route-badge {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
            font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
        }
        .route-badge.has-route { background: var(--green-soft); color: var(--green); border: 1px solid rgba(18,161,80,0.2); }
        .route-badge.no-route  { background: var(--surface2); color: var(--text3); border: 1px solid var(--border); }

        /* Textarea */
        .geojson-area {
            width: 100%; height: 180px; padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 10px; background: var(--surface2);
            border: 1.5px solid var(--border); color: var(--text);
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;
            line-height: 1.6; resize: vertical; outline: none; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .geojson-area:focus {
            border-color: var(--blue); background: #fff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(27,95,173,0.08);
        }
        .geojson-area::placeholder { color: var(--text3); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; }

        /* Status badge */
        .geojson-status {
            display: none; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
            padding: 9px 13px; border-radius: 8px; margin-top: 8px;
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5;
        }
        .geojson-status.success { background: var(--green-soft); color: var(--green); border: 1px solid rgba(18,161,80,0.2); }
        .geojson-status.error   { background: var(--red-soft);   color: var(--red);   border: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.2); }
        .geojson-status.info    { background: var(--blue-soft);   color: var(--blue);  border: 1px solid rgba(27,95,173,0.15); }

        /* Preview map */
        .geojson-preview-wrap {
            display: none; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;
            border: 1.5px solid var(--border); background: #eef1f5; margin-top: 12px;
        }
        .geojson-preview-wrap.visible { display: block; }
        #geojson-preview-map { height: 320px; }

        /* Stops expand panel */
        .stops-panel {
            background:var(--surface2); border-radius:10px; padding:16px;
            margin-top:8px; border:1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .stops-panel-header {
            display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:12px;
        }
        .stops-panel-title { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text2); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       DUPLICATE IDs PANEL
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        .dup-panel {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            border: 1.5px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.25);
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff5f5 0%, #fff 100%);
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(204,31,38,0.08), 0 0 0 1px rgba(204,31,38,0.04);
            animation: fadeUp 0.3s ease both;
        }
        .dup-panel-header {
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 14px 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(204,31,38,0.07) 0%, rgba(204,31,38,0.03) 100%);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.12);
            cursor: pointer; user-select: none;
        }
        .dup-panel-header:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(204,31,38,0.1) 0%, rgba(204,31,38,0.05) 100%); }
        .dup-panel-header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
        .dup-panel-icon {
            width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; flex-shrink: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #CC1F26, #e53e3e);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 18px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(204,31,38,0.3);
        }
        .dup-panel-title {
            font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--red);
            letter-spacing: 0.01em;
        }
        .dup-panel-sub {
            font-size: 11px; color: rgba(204,31,38,0.65); margin-top: 2px;
        }
        .dup-panel-badge {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
            background: var(--red); color: #fff;
            font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(204,31,38,0.35);
        }
        .dup-panel-chevron {
            font-size: 12px; color: var(--red); transition: transform 0.25s;
            margin-left: 8px; opacity: 0.7;
        }
        .dup-panel.collapsed .dup-panel-chevron { transform: rotate(-90deg); }
        .dup-panel-body { padding: 0 20px 18px; }
        .dup-panel.collapsed .dup-panel-body { display: none; }

        /* Divider inside panel */
        .dup-panel-divider {
            height: 1px; background: rgba(204,31,38,0.1);
            margin: 0 -20px 16px;
        }

        /* Individual duplicate record */
        .dup-record {
            display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 14px;
            padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 10px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.12);
            background: #fff;
            margin-bottom: 8px; transition: box-shadow 0.15s;
        }
        .dup-record:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
        .dup-record:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(204,31,38,0.1); }
        .dup-record-avatar {
            width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 9px; flex-shrink: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(204,31,38,0.15), rgba(204,31,38,0.06));
            border: 1.5px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.18);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--red);
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
        }
        .dup-record-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
        .dup-record-id {
            display: inline-block; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--red);
            background: var(--red-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.2);
            padding: 2px 9px; border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 3px;
        }
        .dup-record-name {
            font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text);
            margin-bottom: 6px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
        }
        .dup-record-lines {
            display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px;
        }
        .dup-line-tag {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
            background: var(--blue-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(27,95,173,0.2);
            color: var(--blue); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
            padding: 2px 9px; border-radius: 6px;
        }
        .dup-line-tag::before { content: ''; font-size: 10px; }
        .dup-record-count {
            flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            background: rgba(204,31,38,0.07); border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.12);
        }
        .dup-record-count-num {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--red); line-height: 1;
        }
        .dup-record-count-label { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(204,31,38,0.6); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-top: 2px; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- LOADER -->
<div id="loader">
    <img src="data:image/webp;base64," style="height:32px;border-radius:7px;margin-bottom:4px">
    <div class="loader-bar-track"><div class="loader-bar-fill"></div></div>
    <p>Loading Transport Data</p>
</div>

<!-- LOGIN -->
<div id="login-overlay">
    <div class="login-wrap">
        <!-- Left Panel -->
        <div class="login-left">
            <div class="login-left-content">
                <div class="login-brand">
                    <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="logo">
                    <div>
                        <div class="login-brand-name">Jushi Egypt</div>
                        <div class="login-brand-sub">Transport Portal</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="login-headline">
                    Fleet intelligence,<br><span>at a glance.</span>
                </div>
                <div class="login-tagline">
                    Real-time visibility into every bus route, passenger, and stop across the Jushi Egypt transport network.
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="login-modules">
                <div class="login-module">
                    <div class="login-module-icon" style="background:rgba(27,95,173,0.15)">️</div>
                    <div>
                        <div class="login-module-name">Fleet Insights</div>
                        <div class="login-module-desc">Live map · all routes · passenger counts</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="login-module">
                    <div class="login-module-icon" style="background:rgba(107,58,107,0.15)"></div>
                    <div>
                        <div class="login-module-name">Routes Analysis</div>
                        <div class="login-module-desc">Line analytics · stop breakdowns · trends</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="login-module">
                    <div class="login-module-icon" style="background:rgba(204,31,38,0.12)"></div>
                    <div>
                        <div class="login-module-name">Passengers</div>
                        <div class="login-module-desc">Employee roster · assignments · search</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right Panel — Form -->
        <div class="login-right">
            <div class="login-form-header">
                <div class="login-form-title" id="login-title">Welcome back</div>
                <div class="login-form-sub" id="login-subtitle">Sign in to access the portal</div>
            </div>
            <div class="lf">
                <label>Username</label>
                <input type="text" id="login-user" placeholder="Enter your username" autocomplete="off">
            </div>
            <div class="lf">
                <label>Password</label>
                <input type="password" id="login-pass" placeholder="Enter your password">
            </div>
            <button class="login-submit" onclick="doLogin()"><span>Sign In →</span></button>
            <div class="login-error" id="login-error">Incorrect username or password. Please try again.</div>
            <div class="login-footer">
                <div class="login-footer-dot"></div>
                <div class="login-footer-text">Connected to Google Sheets · Data updates live</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- HEADER -->
<header class="hidden">
    <div class="logo">
        <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="logo">
        <span class="logo-name">Jushi Egypt</span>
        <div class="logo-divider"></div>
        <span class="logo-context" id="logo-context">Fleet Insights</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-tabs">
        <button class="nav-tab active" id="tab-map" onclick="switchTab('map')">Fleet Insights</button>
        <button class="nav-tab" id="tab-analytics" onclick="switchTab('analytics')">Routes Analysis</button>
        <button class="nav-tab" id="tab-passengers" onclick="switchTab('passengers')">Passengers</button>
        <button class="nav-tab" id="tab-manage" onclick="switchTab('manage')" style="display:none">⚙ Manage</button>
    </div>
    <div class="header-right">
        <div class="header-status">
            <div class="header-status-dot"></div>
            <span>Live from Sheets</span>
        </div>
        <div class="header-user">
            <div class="header-avatar" id="a-avatar">?</div>
            <span class="header-uname" id="a-username">—</span>
        </div>
        <button class="header-refresh-btn" id="btn-refresh" onclick="doRefresh()" title="Refresh Data">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                <polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"/>
                <polyline points="1 20 1 14 7 14"/>
                <path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.85-3.36L23 10M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 0 20.49 15"/>
            </svg>
        </button>
        <button class="header-signout-btn" onclick="doLogout()" title="Sign Out">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                <path d="M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4"/>
                <polyline points="16 17 21 12 16 7"/>
                <line x1="21" y1="12" x2="9" y2="12"/>
            </svg>
        </button>
    </div>
</header>

<!-- MAP PAGE -->
<div class="page active" id="map-page">
    <div class="main-content">
        <div id="sidebar">
            <div class="sidebar-title">Bus Lines</div>
            <div id="sidebar-lines"></div>
        </div>
        <div id="map"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="stats">
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-label">Lines</div><div class="stat-value" id="s-lines">—</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-label">Total Stops</div><div class="stat-value" id="s-stops">—</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-label">Total Passengers</div><div class="stat-value" id="s-passengers">—</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-label">Last Refresh</div><div class="stat-value" id="s-time" style="font-size:13px;padding-top:3px">—</div></div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- ANALYTICS PAGE -->
<div class="page" id="analytics-page">
    <div class="analytics-layout">
         <div class="analytics-sidebar">
             <div class="analytics-sidebar-title">Routes</div>
             <div class="analytics-user-badge">
                 <div class="analytics-user-avatar" id="a-avatar-an">?</div>
                 <div>
                     <div class="analytics-user-name" id="a-username-an">—</div>
                     <div class="analytics-user-role">Analyst</div>
                 </div>
             </div>
             <div class="shift-filter-wrap" id="an-shift-filter-wrap">
                 <button class="shift-filter-btn" id="an-shift-filter-btn" onclick="toggleAnShiftDropdown(event)">
                     <span id="an-shift-filter-label">All Shifts</span>
                     <span class="shift-filter-arrow">▾</span>
                 </button>
                 <div class="shift-dropdown" id="an-shift-dropdown">
                     <div class="shift-dropdown-header">
                         <span>Shift Type</span>
                         <button onclick="clearAnShiftFilter()">Clear All</button>
                     </div>
                     <div id="an-shift-options-list"></div>
                 </div>
             </div>
             <div id="route-selector"></div>
            <button class="logout-btn" style="display:none" onclick="doLogout()">Sign Out</button>
        </div>
        <div class="analytics-main" id="analytics-main">
            <div class="analytics-empty" id="analytics-placeholder">
                <div class="analytics-empty-icon"></div>
                <div class="analytics-empty-text">Loading overview…</div>
                <div class="analytics-empty-sub">Please wait</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- PASSENGERS PAGE -->
<div class="page" id="passengers-page">
    <div class="pass-layout">
        <div class="pass-sidebar">
            <div class="analytics-sidebar-title">Bus Lines</div>
            <div id="pass-line-selector"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="pass-main" id="pass-main">
            <div class="analytics-empty">
                <div class="analytics-empty-icon"></div>
                <div class="analytics-empty-text">Loading passengers…</div>
                <div class="analytics-empty-sub">Please wait</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- MANAGEMENT PAGE -->
<div class="page" id="manage-page">
    <div class="manage-layout">

        <!-- Left sidebar nav -->
        <div class="manage-sidebar">
            <div class="manage-sidebar-title">Management</div>
            <div class="manage-nav-item active" id="mnav-lines" onclick="showManageSection('lines')">
                <div class="manage-nav-icon"></div>
                <div>
                    <div class="manage-nav-label">Bus Lines</div>
                    <div class="manage-nav-sub">Add / edit / delete</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="manage-nav-item" id="mnav-stops" onclick="showManageSection('stops')">
                <div class="manage-nav-icon"></div>
                <div>
                    <div class="manage-nav-label">Stops</div>
                    <div class="manage-nav-sub">Add / edit / delete</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="manage-nav-item" id="mnav-passengers" onclick="showManageSection('passengers')">
                <div class="manage-nav-icon"></div>
                <div>
                    <div class="manage-nav-label">Passengers</div>
                    <div class="manage-nav-sub">Assign / move / remove</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Main content -->
        <div class="manage-main" id="manage-main">
            <div class="analytics-empty">
                <div class="analytics-empty-icon">⚙️</div>
                <div class="analytics-empty-text">Select a section</div>
                <div class="analytics-empty-sub">Choose Lines or Stops from the left</div>
            </div>
        </div>

    </div>
</div>

<!-- ── MODALS ─────────────────────────────────── -->

<!-- Add/Edit Line Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-line">
    <div class="modal">
        <div class="modal-header">
            <div class="modal-title" id="modal-line-title">Add New Line</div>
            <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modal-line')">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body">
            <input type="hidden" id="line-edit-oldid">
            <div class="field">
                <label>Line Name (Arabic / English)</label>
                <input type="text" id="line-name" placeholder="e.g. الاستقامة">
            </div>
            <div class="field">
                <label>Color</label>
                <input type="color" id="line-color" value="#1B5FAD" style="height:42px;padding:4px 8px;cursor:pointer;width:100%">
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-footer">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="closeModal('modal-line')">Cancel</button>
            <button class="btn btn-primary" id="btn-save-line" onclick="saveLine()"><span></span> Save Line</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Add/Edit Stop Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-stop">
    <div class="modal">
        <div class="modal-header">
            <div class="modal-title" id="modal-stop-title">Add New Stop</div>
            <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modal-stop')">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body">
            <input type="hidden" id="stop-edit-oldname">
            <input type="hidden" id="stop-edit-lineid">
            <div class="field">
                <label>Line</label>
                <select id="stop-lineid"></select>
            </div>
            <div class="field">
                <label>Stop Name</label>
                <input type="text" id="stop-name" placeholder="e.g. مسجد الإيمان">
            </div>
            <div class="field-row">
                <div class="field">
                    <label>Latitude</label>
                    <input type="number" step="any" id="stop-lat" placeholder="29.97...">
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                    <label>Longitude</label>
                    <input type="number" step="any" id="stop-lng" placeholder="32.54...">
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="field-row">
                <div class="field">
                    <label>Time</label>
                    <input type="text" id="stop-time" placeholder="7:30 AM">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-footer">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="closeModal('modal-stop')">Cancel</button>
            <button class="btn btn-primary" id="btn-save-stop" onclick="saveStop()"><span></span> Save Stop</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Confirm Delete Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-confirm">
    <div class="modal" style="max-width:400px">
        <div class="modal-header" style="background:var(--red-soft);border-bottom-color:rgba(204,31,38,0.15)">
            <div class="modal-title" style="color:var(--red)"> Confirm Delete</div>
            <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modal-confirm')">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body">
            <p id="confirm-msg" style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.7"></p>
            <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:8px">This action <strong style="color:var(--red)">cannot be undone</strong>.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-footer">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="closeModal('modal-confirm')">← Cancel</button>
            <button class="btn btn-danger" id="btn-confirm-delete" onclick="confirmDelete()">Yes, Delete</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Add/Edit Passenger Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-passenger">
    <div class="modal" style="max-width:520px">
        <div class="modal-header">
            <div class="modal-title" id="modal-passenger-title">Add Passenger</div>
            <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modal-passenger')">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body">
            <input type="hidden" id="pax-edit-oldid">
            <input type="hidden" id="pax-edit-oldsheet">
            <div class="field-row">
                <div class="field">
                    <label>Employee ID</label>
                    <div style="position:relative">
                        <input type="text" id="pax-empid" placeholder="e.g. 0103" oninput="onPaxIdInput(this.value)" autocomplete="off"
                               style="width:100%;padding:10px 36px 10px 12px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;outline:none;transition:all 0.18s">
                        <span id="pax-id-status" style="position:absolute;right:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:14px;display:none"></span>
                    </div>
                    <div id="pax-id-hint" style="font-size:11px;margin-top:4px;display:none"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="field"><label>Full Name</label><input type="text" id="pax-name" placeholder="Ahmed Mohamed" readonly style="background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text3);cursor:not-allowed"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="field-row">
                <div class="field"><label>Department</label><input type="text" id="pax-dept" placeholder="e.g. FAD" readonly style="background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text3);cursor:not-allowed"></div>
                <div class="field"><label>Shift</label><input type="text" id="pax-shift" placeholder="e.g. A" readonly style="background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text3);cursor:not-allowed"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="field-row">
                <div class="field"><label>Bus Line</label><select id="pax-line" onchange="onPaxLineChange(this.value)"></select></div>
                <div class="field"><label>Stop Name</label><select id="pax-stop"><option value="">— Select a stop —</option></select></div>
            </div>
            <div class="field-row">
                <div class="field"><label>Governorate</label><input type="text" id="pax-gov" placeholder="القاهرة" readonly style="background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text3);cursor:not-allowed"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-footer">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="closeModal('modal-passenger')">Cancel</button>
            <button class="btn btn-primary" id="btn-save-passenger" onclick="savePassenger()"><span></span> Save</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- GeoJSON Route Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-route-draw">
    <div class="modal" style="max-width:700px">
        <div class="modal-header">
            <div>
                <div class="modal-title" id="rdraw-title"> Import Route — GeoJSON</div>
                <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px" id="rdraw-subtitle">Line —</div>
            </div>
            <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeRouteDrawModal()">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body" style="padding:18px;gap:12px">

            <!-- Instruction banner -->
            <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:var(--blue-soft);border:1px solid rgba(27,95,173,0.15);border-radius:9px;font-size:12px;color:var(--blue);line-height:1.65">
                الصق GeoJSON صح تحت — الأنواع المدعومة:
                <code style="background:rgba(27,95,173,0.12);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">LineString</code>
                <code style="background:rgba(27,95,173,0.12);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">MultiLineString</code>
                <code style="background:rgba(27,95,173,0.12);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">Feature</code>
                <code style="background:rgba(27,95,173,0.12);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace">FeatureCollection</code>
                · الإحداثيات بالترتيب <strong>[longitude, latitude]</strong>
            </div>

            <!-- Existing route warning -->
            <div id="rdraw-existing" style="display:none;padding:9px 13px;background:var(--amber-soft);border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,0.2);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;color:var(--amber)">
                ⚠️ الخط ده عنده مسار محفوظ — الـ GeoJSON الجديد هيحل محله
            </div>

            <!-- GeoJSON textarea -->
            <div class="field">
                <label>GeoJSON</label>
                <textarea
                        class="geojson-area"
                        id="geojson-input"
                        placeholder='الصق الـ GeoJSON هنا، مثلاً:
{
  "type": "Feature",
  "geometry": {
    "type": "LineString",
    "coordinates": [
      [31.235, 30.044],
      [31.248, 30.061]
    ]
  }
}'
                        oninput="onGeoJSONInput()"
                ></textarea>
            </div>

            <!-- Action buttons row -->
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
                <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="previewGeoJSON()">️ Preview on Map</button>
                <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm"   onclick="clearGeoJSONInput()">✕ Clear</button>
                <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm"   onclick="loadGeoJSONExample()"> Example</button>
            </div>

            <!-- Status message -->
            <div class="geojson-status" id="geojson-status"></div>

            <!-- Preview map (shown after valid preview) -->
            <div class="geojson-preview-wrap" id="geojson-preview-wrap">
                <div id="geojson-preview-map"></div>
            </div>

        </div>
        <div class="modal-footer">
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="closeRouteDrawModal()">Cancel</button>
            <button class="btn btn-primary" id="btn-save-route" onclick="saveRouteDrawing()">
                <span></span> Save Route
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Toast -->
<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
    // ── DATA SOURCES ──────────────────────────────────────────
    const MAP_ROUTES_CSV = 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQgHt_MMcVgS69W6ij9CaeTtWZrou8QPqSxszLx3GrcmUn9mkY5i3v_YPNpKWN30oMAKHFf6nPLOgVZ/pub?gid=173689663&single=true&output=csv';
    const MAP_STOPS_CSV  = 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQgHt_MMcVgS69W6ij9CaeTtWZrou8QPqSxszLx3GrcmUn9mkY5i3v_YPNpKWN30oMAKHFf6nPLOgVZ/pub?gid=1692669508&single=true&output=csv';

    const AN_LINES_CSV = 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR7UlQVu5T66c4r-YzrHWAxNZbLDnaa9S7Ba0d2_7TTO_9bzhxxuMQeSyPqqKxC5HSPTLkvphH9m4Tv/pub?gid=948685208&single=true&output=csv';
    const AN_STOPS_CSV = 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR7UlQVu5T66c4r-YzrHWAxNZbLDnaa9S7Ba0d2_7TTO_9bzhxxuMQeSyPqqKxC5HSPTLkvphH9m4Tv/pub?gid=1716819336&single=true&output=csv';
    const AN_USERS_CSV = 'https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR7UlQVu5T66c4r-YzrHWAxNZbLDnaa9S7Ba0d2_7TTO_9bzhxxuMQeSyPqqKxC5HSPTLkvphH9m4Tv/pub?gid=1506622408&single=true&output=csv';
    const PASSENGERS_API = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyczqJM9eiotv6ChwtmDcrmKMSNVFe3BigFGGb1ulwkj2eKXPbpAZUfDfboqhGudMoC/exec';

    // ── STATE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    let currentTab = 'map';
    let isLoggedIn = false;
    let currentUser = null;
    let isVirtualUser = false;
    let usersData = [];
    // assignedLine = the Line Name string from Users sheet (e.g. "الهاويس")
    // 'ALL' means Management/Virtual — no restriction
    // For Admin users this equals BOTH the Line Name AND the _sheet name used in passengers data
    let assignedLine = 'ALL';

    // ── VIRTUAL USER GUARD ─────────────────────────────────────
    function virtualGuard(e) {
        if (!isVirtualUser) return false; // not virtual — allow action
        if (e) { e.stopPropagation(); e.preventDefault(); }
        // Show a styled toast-like modal alert
        const existing = document.getElementById('virtual-guard-toast');
        if (existing) existing.remove();
        const el = document.createElement('div');
        el.id = 'virtual-guard-toast';
        el.style.cssText = `
    position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    z-index:999999;
    background:#fff;border-radius:16px;
    box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(15,22,35,0.18),0 0 0 1px rgba(204,31,38,0.15);
    padding:32px 36px;max-width:380px;width:90%;text-align:center;
    animation:vgFadeIn 0.2s ease;
  `;
        el.innerHTML = `
    <style>
      @keyframes vgFadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-54%)}to{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)}}
    </style>
    <div style="width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:#FCEAEA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 16px;font-size:24px"></div>
    <div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#0F1623;margin-bottom:8px">View-Only Access</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:#4A5568;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:20px">
      Your account has <strong>Virtual</strong> permissions.<br>
      Data modifications are not permitted for this role.
    </div>
    <button onclick="document.getElementById('virtual-guard-toast').remove()"
      style="padding:10px 28px;border-radius:10px;border:none;background:#0F1623;color:#fff;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:0.04em">
      Got it
    </button>
  `;
        // Backdrop
        const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
        backdrop.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:999998;background:rgba(15,22,35,0.4)';
        backdrop.onclick = () => { el.remove(); backdrop.remove(); };
        document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
        document.body.appendChild(el);
        return true; // was virtual — action blocked
    }
     let anRoutesData = [];
     let anStopsData = [];
     let anDataLoaded = false;
     let activeCharts = [];
     let anSelectedRoute = ''; // Track currently selected analytics route (route ID or 'overview')

      // Passengers state
     let passDataLoaded = false;
     let passAllData = [];
     let passCurrentLine = 'ALL';
     let passSearchQuery = '';
     let passDeptFilter = 'ALL';
     let passShiftFilter = new Set(); // empty = all shifts selected
     // Analytics tab shift filter
     let anShiftFilter = new Set();

     // ── CSV ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function parseCSV(text) {
        const lines = text.trim().replace(/\r/g, '').split('\n');
        const headers = lines[0].split(',').map(h => h.trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ''));
        return lines.slice(1).filter(l => l.trim()).map(line => {
            const vals = line.match(/(".*?"|[^,]+)(?=,|$)/g) || line.split(',');
            const obj = {};
            headers.forEach((h, i) => { obj[h] = (vals[i] || '').trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ''); });
            return obj;
        });
    }

    // ── CSV CACHE (5-minute TTL) ──────────────────────────────
    const _csvCache = {};
    const _CSV_TTL  = 5 * 60 * 1000; // 5 minutes

    async function fetchCSV(url, bustCache = false) {
        const now = Date.now();
        if (!bustCache && _csvCache[url] && (now - _csvCache[url].ts) < _CSV_TTL) {
            return _csvCache[url].text;
        }
        const proxies = [
            url,
            'https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=' + encodeURIComponent(url),
            'https://corsproxy.io/?' + encodeURIComponent(url),
        ];
        for (const u of proxies) {
            try {
                const controller = new AbortController();
                const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 8000);
                // Use default cache on first load; no-store only when explicitly busting
                const res = await fetch(u, { cache: bustCache ? 'no-store' : 'default', signal: controller.signal });
                clearTimeout(timeout);
                const text = await res.text();
                if (text && text.includes(',') && !text.toLowerCase().includes('<html')) {
                    _csvCache[url] = { text, ts: Date.now() };
                    return text;
                }
            } catch(e) {}
        }
        throw new Error('Failed to fetch: ' + url);
    }

    // ── TAB SWITCHING ──────────────────────────────────────────
    function switchTab(tab) {
        if (!isLoggedIn) return;
        if (tab === 'map')       { showMapPage();        return; }
        if (tab === 'analytics') { showAnalyticsPage();  return; }
        if (tab === 'passengers'){ showPassengersPage(); return; }
        if (tab === 'manage')    { showManagePage();     return; }
    }

    function showMapPage() {
        currentTab = 'map';
        document.getElementById('login-overlay').style.display = 'none';
        document.getElementById('map-page').classList.add('active');
        document.getElementById('analytics-page').classList.remove('active');
        document.getElementById('passengers-page').classList.remove('active');
        document.getElementById('manage-page').classList.remove('active');
