        if (points.length > 1) {
            const poly = L.polyline(points, { color, weight: 4, opacity: 0.9, lineJoin: 'round', lineCap: 'round' });
            poly.bindTooltip(
                `<div class="route-tooltip" style="border-left:3px solid ${color}"><strong>${name}</strong></div>`,
                { sticky: true, className: 'route-tooltip', offset: [10, 0] }
            );
            poly.addTo(group);

            // Direction arrows
            const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(points.length / 20));
            for (let i = 0; i < points.length - 1; i += step) {
                const p1 = points[i], p2 = points[i+1];
                const angle = Math.atan2(p2[0]-p1[0], p2[1]-p1[1]) * 180 / Math.PI;
                const icon = L.divIcon({
                    html: `<div style="width:0;height:0;border-left:6px solid transparent;border-right:6px solid transparent;border-bottom:11px solid ${color};opacity:0.8;transform:rotate(${90-angle}deg);transform-origin:center"></div>`,
                    className: '', iconSize: [12, 11], iconAnchor: [6, 5]
                });
                L.marker([(p1[0]+p2[0])/2,(p1[1]+p2[1])/2], { icon, interactive: false }).addTo(group);
            }
        }

        // Redraw stop markers + connectors against the new route shape
        const stopsForLine = stopsData.filter(s => String(s['Line ID']) === id);
        stopsForLine.forEach((stop, idx) => {
            const lat = parseFloat(stop['Lat']), lng = parseFloat(stop['Lng']);
            if (isNaN(lat) || isNaN(lng)) return;
            const isFirst = idx === 0, isLast = idx === stopsForLine.length - 1;
            let radius, fillColor, strokeWidth, strokeColor;
            if (isFirst)      { radius=10; fillColor=color;     strokeWidth=3; strokeColor='#ffffff'; }
            else if (isLast)  { radius=10; fillColor='#ffffff'; strokeWidth=3; strokeColor=color; }
            else              { radius=5;  fillColor='#ffffff'; strokeWidth=2; strokeColor=color; }

            // Connector to nearest point on new route
            if (points.length > 1) {
                const nearest = nearestPointOnLine(points, lat, lng);
                if (nearest) {
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(nearest[0]-lat,2)+Math.pow(nearest[1]-lng,2));
                    if (dist > 0.00008) {
                        L.polyline([[lat,lng], nearest], {
                            color, weight: 1.5, opacity: 0.55, dashArray: '4 4', interactive: false
                        }).addTo(group);
                    }
                }
            }

            // Halo
            L.circleMarker([lat,lng], {
                radius: radius+5, color, weight:0, fillColor: color, fillOpacity:0.12, interactive:false
            }).addTo(group);

            // Stop circle
            const circle = L.circleMarker([lat,lng], {radius, color:strokeColor, weight:strokeWidth, fillColor, fillOpacity:1});
            circle.bindTooltip(`<div class="custom-tooltip"><div class="tt-name" style="color:${color}">${stop['Stop name']}</div><div class="tt-row"><span>Line</span><span>${name}</span></div>${stop['Time']?`<div class="tt-row"><span>Time</span><span>${stop['Time']}</span></div>`:''}<div class="tt-row"><span>Passengers</span><span>${stop['Passengers']||'—'}</span></div></div>`,{permanent:false,sticky:false,className:'custom-tooltip',offset:[0,-8]});
            circle.on('mouseover', function(){ this.setStyle({radius: radius+3}); });
            circle.on('mouseout',  function(){ this.setStyle({radius}); });
            circle.addTo(group);
        });
    }



    // ── SESSION RESTORE ───────────────────────────────────────
    function _restoreSession() {
        try {
            const saved = sessionStorage.getItem('jushi_session');
            if (!saved) return;
            const { u, p } = JSON.parse(saved);
            const match = usersData.find(row =>
                (row['User Name'] || '').trim().toLowerCase() === (u || '').toLowerCase() &&
                (row['Password'] || '').trim() === p
            );
            if (!match) { sessionStorage.removeItem('jushi_session'); return; }
            isLoggedIn  = true;
            currentUser = match;
            document.getElementById('login-overlay').style.display = 'none';
            document.querySelector('header').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('a-username').textContent = match['User Name'] || u;
            document.getElementById('a-avatar').textContent = (match['User Name'] || u)[0].toUpperCase();
            const avatarAn = document.getElementById('a-avatar-an');
            const unameAn  = document.getElementById('a-username-an');
            if (avatarAn) avatarAn.textContent = (match['User Name'] || u)[0].toUpperCase();
            if (unameAn)  unameAn.textContent  = match['User Name'] || u;
            const position = (match['Position'] || match['Management'] || match['Role'] || match['role'] || '').trim().toLowerCase();
            isVirtualUser  = (position === 'virtual');
            assignedLine   = (match['Line ID'] || '').trim() || 'ALL';
            const manageTab = document.getElementById('tab-manage');
            const isAdmin = (position === 'admin');

            if (isAdmin) {
                // Admin: يشوف Passengers و Manage بس
                document.getElementById('tab-map').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('tab-analytics').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('tab-passengers').style.display = '';
                manageTab.style.display = '';
            } else if (position === 'management' || position === 'virtual' || assignedLine !== 'ALL') {
                document.getElementById('tab-map').style.display = '';
                document.getElementById('tab-analytics').style.display = '';
                document.getElementById('tab-passengers').style.display = '';
                manageTab.style.display = '';
            } else {
                document.getElementById('tab-map').style.display = '';
                document.getElementById('tab-analytics').style.display = '';
                document.getElementById('tab-passengers').style.display = '';
                manageTab.style.display = 'none';
            }
            const existingBadge = document.getElementById('virtual-badge');
            if (existingBadge) existingBadge.remove();
            if (isVirtualUser) {
                const badge = document.createElement('span');
                badge.id = 'virtual-badge';
                badge.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;background:#EBF2FC;color:#1B5FAD;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(27,95,173,0.2)';
                badge.textContent = 'View Only';
                document.getElementById('a-username').after(badge);
            }
            if (position === 'admin') {
                showPassengersPage();
            } else {
                showMapPage();
            }
            // Rebuild map with correct filter — in session restore, cache is always populated from init()
            const cachedRoutes = parseCSV(_csvCache[MAP_ROUTES_CSV]?.text || '');
            const cachedStops  = parseCSV(_csvCache[MAP_STOPS_CSV]?.text  || '');
            console.log('[restoreSession] assignedLine:', assignedLine, '| cachedRoutes:', cachedRoutes.length);
            if (cachedRoutes.length) {
                buildMap(cachedRoutes, cachedStops);
            } else {
                Promise.all([fetchCSV(MAP_ROUTES_CSV, true), fetchCSV(MAP_STOPS_CSV, true)])
                    .then(([rT, sT]) => buildMap(parseCSV(rT), parseCSV(sT)))
                    .catch(e => console.error('[restoreSession] map fetch failed:', e));
            }
            anDataLoaded   = false;
            passDataLoaded = false;
            loadManageData();
            loadManagePaxData();
        } catch(e) { /* ignore storage errors */ }
    }

    // ── REFRESH ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function doRefresh() {
        const btn = document.getElementById('btn-refresh');
        if (btn.classList.contains('spinning')) return;
        btn.classList.add('spinning');
        try {
            const [rText, sText] = await Promise.all([fetchCSV(MAP_ROUTES_CSV, true), fetchCSV(MAP_STOPS_CSV, true)]);
            buildMap(parseCSV(rText), parseCSV(sText));
            if (currentTab === 'analytics' && anDataLoaded) {
                anDataLoaded = false;
                await loadAnalyticsData();
            }
            if (currentTab === 'passengers' && passDataLoaded) {
                passDataLoaded = false;
                await loadPassengersData();
            }
            if (currentTab === 'manage') {
                await loadManageData();
                const pos = (currentUser?.['Position'] || currentUser?.['Management'] || currentUser?.['Role'] || currentUser?.['role'] || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                if (pos === 'admin') {
                    // Admin: اخبي Lines و Stops واظهر Passengers بس
                    document.getElementById('mnav-lines').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('mnav-stops').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('mnav-passengers').style.display = '';
                    showManageSection('passengers');
                } else {
                    document.getElementById('mnav-lines').style.display = '';
                    document.getElementById('mnav-stops').style.display = '';
                    document.getElementById('mnav-passengers').style.display = '';
                    showManageSection('lines');
                }
            }
            showToast('Data refreshed ✓', 'success');
        } catch(e) {
            showToast('Refresh failed — check connection', 'error');
        } finally {
            btn.classList.remove('spinning');
        }
    }

    // ── INIT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function init() {
        try {
            // Load users + map data in parallel
            const [rText, sText, uText] = await Promise.all([
                fetchCSV(MAP_ROUTES_CSV), fetchCSV(MAP_STOPS_CSV), fetchCSV(AN_USERS_CSV)
            ]);
            usersData = parseCSV(uText);
            buildMap(parseCSV(rText), parseCSV(sText));
            document.getElementById('loader').style.opacity='0';
            setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('loader').style.display='none',500);
            // Restore session if the user was previously logged in
            _restoreSession();
        } catch(e) {
            console.error(e);
            // Hide loader and show login even if map data fails — user can still log in
            const loader = document.getElementById('loader');
            loader.style.opacity = '0';
            setTimeout(() => {
                loader.style.display = 'none';
                showLogin();
            }, 400);
        }
    }

    // ── MANAGEMENT ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    const MANAGE_API = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyczqJM9eiotv6ChwtmDcrmKMSNVFe3BigFGGb1ulwkj2eKXPbpAZUfDfboqhGudMoC/exec';

    let manageLines  = []; // cached lines
    let manageStops  = []; // cached stops
    let deletePayload = null; // pending delete action

    // ── Sub-section switcher ──
    function showManageSection(section) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.manage-nav-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
        document.getElementById('mnav-' + section).classList.add('active');
        if (section === 'lines') renderLinesSection();
        if (section === 'stops') renderStopsSection();
        if (section === 'passengers') { if (!managePaxLoaded) loadManagePaxData().then(() => renderPassengersSection()); else renderPassengersSection(); }
    }

    // ── Load data from Sheets ──
    async function loadManageData() {
        try {
            const [lText, sText] = await Promise.all([fetchCSV(MAP_ROUTES_CSV), fetchCSV(MAP_STOPS_CSV)]);
            manageLines = parseCSV(lText);
            manageStops = parseCSV(sText);
            // Filter to assigned line if not management/virtual
            if (assignedLine !== 'ALL') {
                const norm = s => (s || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
                const target = norm(assignedLine);
                manageLines = manageLines.filter(l => norm(l['Line Name']) === target);
                const allowedIds = new Set(manageLines.map(l => String(l['Line ID']).trim()));
                manageStops = manageStops.filter(s => allowedIds.has(String(s['Line ID']).trim()));
                console.log('[manage] assignedLine:', assignedLine, '| matched lines:', manageLines.length, '| stops:', manageStops.length);
            }
        } catch(e) { showToast('Failed to load data', 'error'); }
    }

    // ── LINES SECTION ──────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderLinesSection() {
        const main = document.getElementById('manage-main');
        main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="manage-section-header">
      <div>
        <div class="manage-section-title">Bus Lines</div>
        <div class="manage-section-sub">${manageLines.length} lines · click a line to manage its stops</div>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openAddLine()">+ Add Line</button>
    </div>
    <div class="manage-table-wrap">
      <table class="manage-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>ID</th><th>Line Name</th><th>Color</th><th>Route</th><th>Stops</th><th>Actions</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="lines-tbody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>`;
        renderLinesTable();
    }

    function renderLinesTable() {
        const tbody = document.getElementById('lines-tbody');
        if (!tbody) return;
        tbody.innerHTML = '';
        manageLines.forEach(line => {
            const id       = line['Line ID'];
            const name     = line['Line Name'];
            const color    = line['Color'] || '#888';
            const stops    = manageStops.filter(s => String(s['Line ID']) === String(id)).length;
            // Check if a saved route exists (stored as JSON string in the Route column)
            const hasRoute = !!(line['Route'] && line['Route'].length > 10);
            const safeName = name.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
            const tr = document.createElement('tr');
            tr.innerHTML = `
      <td><span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-weight:500">${id}</span></td>
      <td style="font-weight:600">${name}</td>
      <td><span class="color-swatch" style="background:${color}"></span><span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px">${color}</span></td>
      <td>
        <span class="route-badge ${hasRoute ? 'has-route' : 'no-route'}">
          ${hasRoute ? '✓ Saved' : '— None'}
        </span>
      </td>
      <td><span style="background:var(--blue-soft);color:var(--blue);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600">${stops} stops</span></td>
      <td>
        <div class="actions">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="openDrawRoute('${id}','${safeName}','${color}',${hasRoute})">️ Route</button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="openEditLine('${id}','${safeName}','${color}')">✏️ Edit</button>
          <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="openDeleteLine('${id}','${safeName}')"></button>
        </div>
      </td>`;
            tbody.appendChild(tr);
        });
    }

    function openAddLine() {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        document.getElementById('modal-line-title').textContent = 'Add New Line';
        document.getElementById('line-edit-oldid').value = '';
        document.getElementById('line-name').value = '';
        document.getElementById('line-color').value = '#1B5FAD';
        openModal('modal-line');
    }

    function openEditLine(id, name, color) {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        document.getElementById('modal-line-title').textContent = 'Edit Line';
        document.getElementById('line-edit-oldid').value = id;
        document.getElementById('line-name').value = name;
        document.getElementById('line-color').value = color;
        openModal('modal-line');
    }

    async function saveLine() {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        const oldId = document.getElementById('line-edit-oldid').value;
        const name  = document.getElementById('line-name').value.trim();
        const color = document.getElementById('line-color').value;
        if (!name) { showToast('Please enter a line name', 'error'); return; }

        // Auto-generate next ID if adding new line
        let id = oldId;
        if (!oldId) {
            const maxId = manageLines.reduce((max, l) => Math.max(max, parseInt(l['Line ID']) || 0), 0);
            id = String(maxId + 1);
        }

        const btn = document.getElementById('btn-save-line');
        btn.classList.add('loading'); btn.textContent = 'Saving…';

        const action  = oldId ? 'updateRoute' : 'addRoute';
        const payload = { action, id, name, color };
        if (oldId) payload.oldId = oldId;

        const ok = await postToSheet(payload);
        btn.classList.remove('loading'); btn.innerHTML = '<span></span> Save Line';
        if (ok) {
            closeModal('modal-line');
            showToast(oldId ? 'Line updated ✓' : `Line added (ID: ${id}) ✓`, 'success');
            await loadManageData();
            renderLinesSection();
        }
    }

    function openDeleteLine(id, name) {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        document.getElementById('confirm-msg').innerHTML =
            `Are you sure you want to delete <strong>${name}</strong> (Line ${id})?<br><br>
     <span style="color:var(--red);font-size:12px">⚠️ This will also delete all stops on this line.</span>`;
        deletePayload = { action: 'deleteRoute', id };
        openModal('modal-confirm');
    }

    // ── STOPS SECTION ──────────────────────────────────────────
    function renderStopsSection() {
        const main = document.getElementById('manage-main');
        // Build line options
        const lineOptions = manageLines.map(l =>
            `<option value="${l['Line ID']}">${l['Line ID']} — ${l['Line Name']}</option>`
        ).join('');

        main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="manage-section-header">
      <div>
        <div class="manage-section-title">Stops</div>
        <div class="manage-section-sub">${manageStops.length} total stops · filter by line</div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
        <select id="stops-filter-line" onchange="renderStopsTable()" style="padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none">
          <option value="ALL">All Lines</option>
          ${lineOptions}
        </select>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openAddStop()">+ Add Stop</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="manage-table-wrap">
      <table class="manage-table">
        <thead>
          <tr><th>Line</th><th>Stop Name</th><th>Lat</th><th>Lng</th><th>Time</th><th>Pax</th><th>Actions</th></tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="stops-tbody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>`;
        renderStopsTable();
    }

    function renderStopsTable() {
        const tbody  = document.getElementById('stops-tbody');
        if (!tbody) return;
        const filter = document.getElementById('stops-filter-line')?.value || 'ALL';
        const stops  = filter === 'ALL' ? manageStops : manageStops.filter(s => String(s['Line ID']) === String(filter));
        tbody.innerHTML = '';
        stops.forEach(stop => {
            const lineId = stop['Line ID'];
            const line   = manageLines.find(l => String(l['Line ID']) === String(lineId));
            const color  = line?.['Color'] || '#888';
            const name   = stop['Stop name'] || '—';
            const tr = document.createElement('tr');
            tr.innerHTML = `
      <td><span class="color-swatch" style="background:${color};width:10px;height:10px"></span>
          <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600">${line?.['Line Name'] || lineId}</span></td>
      <td style="font-weight:500">${name}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">${parseFloat(stop['Lat']).toFixed(5)}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">${parseFloat(stop['Lng']).toFixed(5)}</td>
      <td style="font-size:12px">${stop['Time'] || '—'}</td>
      <td><span style="background:var(--green-soft);color:var(--green);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600">${stop['Passengers'] || 0}</span></td>
      <td>
        <div class="actions">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="openEditStop(${JSON.stringify(stop).replace(/"/g,"'")})">✏️</button>
          <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="openDeleteStop('${String(lineId)}','${name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')"></button>
        </div>
      </td>`;
            tbody.appendChild(tr);
        });
        if (!stops.length) {
            tbody.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:var(--text3)">No stops found</td></tr>`;
        }
    }

    function openAddStop() {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        document.getElementById('modal-stop-title').textContent = 'Add New Stop';
        document.getElementById('stop-edit-oldname').value = '';
        document.getElementById('stop-edit-lineid').value = '';
        document.getElementById('stop-name').value = '';
        document.getElementById('stop-lat').value = '';
        document.getElementById('stop-lng').value = '';
        document.getElementById('stop-time').value = '7:30 AM';
        const sel = document.getElementById('stop-lineid');
        sel.innerHTML = manageLines.map(l => `<option value="${l['Line ID']}">${l['Line ID']} — ${l['Line Name']}</option>`).join('');
        openModal('modal-stop');
    }

    function openEditStop(stopObj) {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        if (typeof stopObj === 'string') {
            try { stopObj = JSON.parse(stopObj.replace(/'/g,'"')); } catch(e) { return; }
        }
        document.getElementById('modal-stop-title').textContent = 'Edit Stop';
        document.getElementById('stop-edit-oldname').value = stopObj['Stop name'] || '';
        document.getElementById('stop-edit-lineid').value  = stopObj['Line ID']   || '';
        document.getElementById('stop-name').value         = stopObj['Stop name'] || '';
        document.getElementById('stop-lat').value          = stopObj['Lat']        || '';
        document.getElementById('stop-lng').value          = stopObj['Lng']        || '';
        document.getElementById('stop-time').value         = stopObj['Time']       || '';
        const sel = document.getElementById('stop-lineid');
        sel.innerHTML = manageLines.map(l =>
            `<option value="${l['Line ID']}" ${String(l['Line ID'])===String(stopObj['Line ID'])?'selected':''}>${l['Line ID']} — ${l['Line Name']}</option>`
        ).join('');
        openModal('modal-stop');
    }

    async function saveStop() {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        const oldName   = document.getElementById('stop-edit-oldname').value;
        const oldLineId = document.getElementById('stop-edit-lineid').value;
        const lineId    = document.getElementById('stop-lineid').value;
        const name      = document.getElementById('stop-name').value.trim();
        const lat       = document.getElementById('stop-lat').value.trim();
        const lng       = document.getElementById('stop-lng').value.trim();
        const time      = document.getElementById('stop-time').value.trim();

        if (!lineId || !name || !lat || !lng) { showToast('Please fill all required fields', 'error'); return; }

        const btn = document.getElementById('btn-save-stop');
        btn.classList.add('loading'); btn.textContent = 'Saving…';

        const action  = oldName ? 'updateStop' : 'addStop';
        const payload = { action, lineId, name, lat, lng, time };
        if (oldName) { payload.oldName = oldName; payload.oldLineId = oldLineId; }

        const ok = await postToSheet(payload);
        btn.classList.remove('loading'); btn.innerHTML = '<span></span> Save Stop';
        if (ok) {
            closeModal('modal-stop');
            showToast(oldName ? 'Stop updated ✓' : 'Stop added ✓', 'success');
            await loadManageData();
            renderStopsSection();
        }
    }

    function openDeleteStop(lineId, name) {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        document.getElementById('confirm-msg').innerHTML =
            `Are you sure you want to delete stop <strong>${name}</strong>?`;
        deletePayload = { action: 'deleteStop', lineId, name };
        openModal('modal-confirm');
    }

    async function confirmDelete() {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        if (!deletePayload) return;
        const btn = document.getElementById('btn-confirm-delete');
        btn.classList.add('loading'); btn.textContent = 'Deleting…';
        const ok = await postToSheet(deletePayload);
        btn.classList.remove('loading'); btn.textContent = 'Delete';
        if (ok) {
            closeModal('modal-confirm');
            showToast('Deleted successfully ✓', 'success');
            await loadManageData();
            // Re-render current section
            const activeNav = document.querySelector('.manage-nav-item.active');
            if (activeNav?.id === 'mnav-lines') renderLinesSection();
            else if (activeNav?.id === 'mnav-stops') renderStopsSection();
            else if (activeNav?.id === 'mnav-passengers') { await loadManagePaxData(); renderPassengersSection(); }
        }
        deletePayload = null;
    }


    // ── PASSENGERS MANAGEMENT SECTION ──────────────────────────
    let managePaxData = [];
    let managePaxLoaded = false;
    let paxSearchQuery = '';
    let paxLineFilter = 'ALL';

    async function loadManagePaxData() {
        try {
            const res = await fetch(PASSENGERS_API);
            const raw = await res.json();
            const EXCLUDE_SHEETS = ['Lines','Stops','Summary','Settings','Sheet1'];
            managePaxData = raw.filter(r => !EXCLUDE_SHEETS.includes(r['_sheet']));
            // Filter to assigned line if not management/virtual
            if (assignedLine !== 'ALL') {
                const norm = s => (s || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
                const target = norm(assignedLine);
                managePaxData = managePaxData.filter(r => norm(r['_sheet']) === target || r['_sheet'] === 'Personnel(EGYPT)');
                console.log('[managePax] assignedLine:', assignedLine, '| records after filter:', managePaxData.length);
            }
            managePaxLoaded = true;
        } catch(e) {
            showToast('Failed to load passengers data', 'error');
        }
    }

    function renderPassengersSection() {
        const main = document.getElementById('manage-main');

        // Build unique sheet/line list
        const ROSTER_SHEET = 'Personnel(EGYPT)';
        const sheets = ['ALL', ...new Set(managePaxData.map(r => r['_sheet']).filter(s => s && s !== ROSTER_SHEET))].sort((a,b) => a === 'ALL' ? -1 : a.localeCompare(b));

        main.innerHTML = `
    <div class="manage-section-header">
      <div>
        <div class="manage-section-title">Passengers</div>
        <div class="manage-section-sub" id="pax-section-sub">${managePaxData.length} total records · manage assignments</div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
        <input type="text" id="pax-mgmt-search" placeholder="  Search name / ID…"
          style="padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none;width:200px"
          oninput="onPaxMgmtSearch(this.value)">
        <select id="pax-mgmt-line-filter" onchange="onPaxMgmtLineFilter(this.value)"
          style="padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;outline:none">
          ${sheets.map(s => `<option value="${s}">${s === 'ALL' ? 'All Lines' : s}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openAddPassenger()">+ Add Passenger</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="manage-table-wrap">
      <table class="manage-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>#</th><th>ID</th><th>Name</th><th>Department</th><th>Shift</th><th>Bus Line</th><th>Stop</th><th>Gov</th><th>Actions</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="pax-mgmt-tbody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>`;

        renderPaxMgmtTable();
    }

    function renderPaxMgmtTable() {
        const tbody = document.getElementById('pax-mgmt-tbody');
        if (!tbody) return;

        const ROSTER_SHEET = 'Personnel(EGYPT)';
        let data = managePaxData.filter(r => r['_sheet'] !== ROSTER_SHEET);
        if (paxLineFilter !== 'ALL') data = data.filter(r => r['_sheet'] === paxLineFilter);
        if (paxSearchQuery) {
            const q = paxSearchQuery.toLowerCase();
            data = data.filter(r => {
                const name = (r['Abd El Rhman Ali Mohamed Ali Hamza'] || r['Name'] || '').toLowerCase();
                const id   = (r['0103'] || r['ID'] || '').toLowerCase();
                return name.includes(q) || id.includes(q);
            });
        }

        const sub = document.getElementById('pax-section-sub');
        if (sub) sub.textContent = `${data.length} records shown`;

        tbody.innerHTML = '';
        if (!data.length) {
            tbody.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="9" style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:var(--text3)">No passengers found</td></tr>`;
            return;
        }

        data.forEach((r, i) => {
            const empId = r['0103'] || r['ID'] || '—';
            const name  = r['Abd El Rhman Ali Mohamed Ali Hamza'] || r['Name'] || '—';
            const dept  = r['FAD'] || r['DEPT'] || '—';
            const shift = r['SHIFT'] || r['shift'] || '—';
            const line  = r['_sheet'] || '—';
            const stop  = r['المحطه'] || r['Stop'] || '—';
            const gov   = r['GOV'] || r['Governorate'] || '—';

            const tr = document.createElement('tr');
            tr.innerHTML = `
      <td style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px">${i+1}</td>
      <td><span style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;background:var(--surface2);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:5px">${empId}</span></td>
      <td style="font-weight:500">${name}</td>
      <td><span style="background:var(--blue-soft);color:var(--blue);padding:2px 7px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600">${dept}</span></td>
      <td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">${shift}</td>
      <td style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2)">${line}</td>
      <td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">${stop}</td>
      <td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">${gov}</td>
      <td>
        <div class="actions">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick='openEditPassenger(${JSON.stringify(r).replace(/'/g,"'")})'>✏️ Edit</button>
          <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="openDeletePassenger(${JSON.stringify({id:empId,name,sheet:line}).replace(/"/g,"'")})"></button>
        </div>
      </td>`;
            tbody.appendChild(tr);
        });
    }

    function onPaxMgmtSearch(val) {
        paxSearchQuery = val;
        renderPaxMgmtTable();
    }

    function onPaxMgmtLineFilter(val) {
        paxLineFilter = val;
        renderPaxMgmtTable();
    }

    function openAddPassenger() {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        document.getElementById('modal-passenger-title').textContent = 'Add Passenger';
        document.getElementById('pax-edit-oldid').value = '';
        document.getElementById('pax-edit-oldsheet').value = '';
        document.getElementById('pax-empid').value = '';
        document.getElementById('pax-name').value = '';
        document.getElementById('pax-dept').value = '';
        document.getElementById('pax-shift').value = '';
        document.getElementById('pax-stop').value = '';
        document.getElementById('pax-gov').value = '';
        _buildPaxLineDropdown('');
        _resetPaxIdStatus();
        openModal('modal-passenger');
        setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('pax-empid').focus(), 100);
    }

    function openEditPassenger(r) {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        if (typeof r === 'string') { try { r = JSON.parse(r.replace(/'/g,"'")); } catch(e) { return; } }
        document.getElementById('modal-passenger-title').textContent = 'Edit Passenger';
        const empId = r['0103'] || r['ID'] || '';
        const name  = r['Abd El Rhman Ali Mohamed Ali Hamza'] || r['Name'] || '';
        document.getElementById('pax-edit-oldid').value    = empId;
        document.getElementById('pax-edit-oldsheet').value = r['_sheet'] || '';
        document.getElementById('pax-empid').value  = empId;
        document.getElementById('pax-name').value   = name;
        document.getElementById('pax-dept').value   = r['FAD'] || r['DEPT'] || '';
        document.getElementById('pax-shift').value  = r['SHIFT'] || r['shift'] || '';
        const currentStop = r['المحطه'] || r['Stop'] || '';
        // stop dropdown will be built after line dropdown
        setTimeout(() => _buildPaxStopDropdown(r['_sheet'] || '', currentStop), 0);
        document.getElementById('pax-gov').value    = r['GOV'] || r['Governorate'] || '';
        _buildPaxLineDropdown(r['_sheet'] || '');
        openModal('modal-passenger');
    }

    function _resetPaxIdStatus() {
        const status = document.getElementById('pax-id-status');
        const hint   = document.getElementById('pax-id-hint');
        const empid  = document.getElementById('pax-empid');
        if (status) { status.style.display = 'none'; status.textContent = ''; }
        if (hint)   { hint.style.display = 'none'; hint.textContent = ''; }
        if (empid)  { empid.style.borderColor = 'var(--border)'; }
    }

    function onPaxIdInput(val) {
        const id = val.trim();
        const status = document.getElementById('pax-id-status');
        const hint   = document.getElementById('pax-id-hint');
        const empid  = document.getElementById('pax-empid');

        if (!id) { _resetPaxIdStatus(); return; }

        // Search in Personnel(EGYPT) sheet
        const ROSTER_SHEET = 'Personnel(EGYPT)';
        const roster = managePaxData.filter(r => r['_sheet'] === ROSTER_SHEET);
        const match  = roster.find(r => {
            // Try every key that might be the ID column
            return Object.values(r).some(v => (v||'').toString().trim().toLowerCase() === id.toLowerCase()) &&
                (() => {
                    const rid = (r['0103'] || r['ID'] || r['id'] || r['EMP_ID'] || r['Emp ID'] || r['Employee ID'] || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                    return rid === id.toLowerCase();
                })();
        }) || roster.find(r => {
            // fallback: check all keys for numeric-looking ID columns
            for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(r)) {
                if (k === '_sheet') continue;
                if ((v||'').toString().trim().toLowerCase() === id.toLowerCase()) return true;
            }
            return false;
        });

        if (match) {
            // Found! — dynamically find name/shift/gov from any likely column
            const keys = Object.keys(match);

            // Name: longest string value (usually the full name column)
            const nameKey = keys.find(k => k !== '_sheet' && (
                k.toLowerCase().includes('name') || k === 'Abd El Rhman Ali Mohamed Ali Hamza'
            )) || keys.find(k => {
                const v = (match[k]||'').toString();
                return v.split(' ').length >= 2 && v.length > 5 && isNaN(v);
            }) || '';
            const name = match[nameKey] || '';

            // Dept: FAD, DEPT, Department
            const deptKey = keys.find(k => ['FAD','DEPT','DEPARTMENT','dept','department'].includes(k)) || '';
            const dept = match[deptKey] || '';

            // Shift: actual column name is "日班\nDay"
            const shiftKey = keys.find(k => k.includes('Day') || k.includes('班') || k.toUpperCase() === 'SHIFT') || '';
            const shift = match[shiftKey] || '';

            // Gov: actual column name is "Suez" (city used as header)
            const govKey = keys.find(k =>
                ['GOV','GOVERNORATE','Governorate','Gov','المحافظه','المحافظة','GOVT','Suez'].includes(k)
                || k.toLowerCase() === 'suez'
            ) || '';
            const gov = match[govKey] || '';

            document.getElementById('pax-name').value  = name;
            document.getElementById('pax-dept').value  = dept;
            document.getElementById('pax-shift').value = shift;
            document.getElementById('pax-gov').value   = gov;

            // Visual feedback — green
            empid.style.borderColor = 'var(--green)';
            status.textContent = '✓';
            status.style.color = 'var(--green)';
            status.style.display = 'inline';
            const missing = [];
            if (!shift) missing.push('Shift');
            if (!gov)   missing.push('Gov');
            hint.textContent = missing.length
                ? `Found: ${name} · Could not detect: ${missing.join(', ')}`
                : `Found: ${name}`;
            hint.style.color = missing.length ? 'var(--amber)' : 'var(--green)';
            hint.style.display = 'block';
            if (missing.length) { empid.style.borderColor = 'var(--amber)'; status.textContent = '~'; status.style.color = 'var(--amber)'; }


        } else if (id.length >= 2) {
            // Not found — show warning but don't block
            empid.style.borderColor = 'var(--amber)';
            status.textContent = '?';
            status.style.color = 'var(--amber)';
            status.style.display = 'inline';
            hint.textContent = 'ID not found in Personnel roster — fill manually';
            hint.style.color = 'var(--amber)';
            hint.style.display = 'block';
        } else {
            _resetPaxIdStatus();
        }
    }

    function _buildPaxLineDropdown(selected) {
        const ROSTER_SHEET = 'Personnel(EGYPT)';
        const sheets = [...new Set(managePaxData.map(r => r['_sheet']).filter(s => s && s !== ROSTER_SHEET))].sort();
        const sel = document.getElementById('pax-line');
        sel.innerHTML = sheets.map(s => `<option value="${s}" ${s===selected?'selected':''}>${s}</option>`).join('');
        // Populate stops for the selected/first line
        const activeSheet = selected || sheets[0] || '';
        _buildPaxStopDropdown(activeSheet, '');
    }

    function onPaxLineChange(lineVal) {
        _buildPaxStopDropdown(lineVal, '');
    }

    function _buildPaxStopDropdown(sheet, selectedStop) {
        const stopSel = document.getElementById('pax-stop');
        if (!stopSel) return;

        // Try to match line by name (flexible: contains, lowercase, etc.)
        const lineObj = manageLines.find(l =>
            l['Line Name'] === sheet ||
            l['Line ID']   === sheet ||
            (l['Line Name'] || '').trim().toLowerCase() === (sheet || '').trim().toLowerCase()
        );

        let stops = [];
        if (lineObj) {
            stops = manageStops.filter(s => String(s['Line ID']) === String(lineObj['Line ID']));
        }

        // Fallback: if manageStops is empty, try passAllData stops for this sheet
        if (!stops.length) {
            const sheetRows = managePaxData.filter(r => r['_sheet'] === sheet);
            const stopNames = [...new Set(sheetRows.map(r => r['المحطه'] || r['Stop'] || '').filter(Boolean))];
            stops = stopNames.map(n => ({ 'Stop name': n }));
        }

        stopSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Select a stop —</option>' +
            stops.map(s => {
                const sname = s['Stop name'] || s['Stop Name'] || '';
                return `<option value="${sname}" ${sname===selectedStop?'selected':''}>${sname}</option>`;
            }).join('');
    }

    async function savePassenger() {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        const oldId    = document.getElementById('pax-edit-oldid').value;
        const oldSheet = document.getElementById('pax-edit-oldsheet').value;
        const empId    = document.getElementById('pax-empid').value.trim();
        const name     = document.getElementById('pax-name').value.trim();
        const dept     = document.getElementById('pax-dept').value.trim();
        const shift    = document.getElementById('pax-shift').value.trim();
        const line     = document.getElementById('pax-line').value;
        const stop     = document.getElementById('pax-stop').value;
        const gov      = document.getElementById('pax-gov').value.trim();

        if (!empId || !name || !line) { showToast('ID, Name and Line are required', 'error'); return; }

        // Check across ALL lines (fetch fresh from API)
        const ROSTER_SHEET = 'Personnel(EGYPT)';
        try {
            const allRes = await fetch(PASSENGERS_API);
            const allRaw = await allRes.json();
            const existingInOtherLine = allRaw.find(r => {
                if (r['_sheet'] === ROSTER_SHEET) return false;
                if (oldId && r['_sheet'] === oldSheet) return false;
                const rid = (r['0103'] || r['ID'] || r['id'] || '').toString().trim().toLowerCase();
                return rid === empId.toLowerCase() && r['_sheet'] !== line;
            });
            if (existingInOtherLine) {
                showToast(`❌ الموظف ده موجود بالفعل في خط "${existingInOtherLine['_sheet']}"`, 'error');
                return;
            }
        } catch(e) {
            showToast('تعذر التحقق من بيانات الموظف', 'error');
            return;
        }

        const btn = document.getElementById('btn-save-passenger');
        btn.classList.add('loading'); btn.textContent = 'Saving…';

        const action  = oldId ? 'updatePassenger' : 'addPassenger';
        const payload = { action, empId, name, dept, shift, sheet: line, stop, gov };
        if (oldId) { payload.oldId = oldId; payload.oldSheet = oldSheet; }

        const ok = await postToSheet(payload);
        btn.classList.remove('loading'); btn.innerHTML = '<span></span> Save';
        if (ok) {
            closeModal('modal-passenger');
            showToast(oldId ? 'Passenger updated ✓' : 'Passenger added ✓', 'success');
            await loadManagePaxData();
            renderPassengersSection();
        }
    }

    function openDeletePassenger(obj) {
        if (virtualGuard()) return;
        if (typeof obj === 'string') { try { obj = JSON.parse(obj.replace(/'/g,'"')); } catch(e) { return; } }
        document.getElementById('confirm-msg').innerHTML =
            `Are you sure you want to remove <strong>${obj.name}</strong> (ID: ${obj.id}) from line <strong>${obj.sheet}</strong>?`;
        deletePayload = { action: 'deletePassenger', empId: obj.id, sheet: obj.sheet };
        openModal('modal-confirm');
    }

    // ── API POST helper ────────────────────────────────────────
    async function postToSheet(payload) {
        try {
            const res = await fetch(MANAGE_API, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' },
                body: JSON.stringify(payload)
            });
            const data = await res.json();
            if (data.status === 'ok') return true;
            showToast(data.message || 'Error occurred', 'error');
            return false;
        } catch(e) {
            showToast('Network error — check Apps Script deployment', 'error');
            return false;
        }
    }

    // ── Modal helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────
    function openModal(id)  { document.getElementById(id).classList.add('open'); }
    function closeModal(id) { document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open'); }

    // Close modal on backdrop click
    document.addEventListener('click', e => {
        if (e.target.classList.contains('modal-backdrop')) {
            e.target.classList.remove('open');
        }
    });

    // ── Toast ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function showToast(msg, type = 'success') {
        const t = document.getElementById('toast');
        t.className = `toast show ${type}`;
        t.innerHTML = (type === 'success' ? '✓ ' : '✕ ') + msg;
        setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 3500);
    }

    init();
</script>
</body>
</html>

option.value:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=0.5">
    <title>Jushi Egypt — Transport Portal</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    <style>
        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       DESIGN TOKENS
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        :root {
            --bg:        #F7F8FA;
            --surface:   #FFFFFF;
            --surface2:  #F0F2F5;
            --border:    #E4E7EC;
            --border2:   #D0D5DD;
            --text:      #0F1623;
            --text2:     #4A5568;
            --text3:     #8F9BB3;
            --blue:      #1B5FAD;
            --blue-soft: #EBF2FC;
            --red:       #CC1F26;
            --red-soft:  #FCEAEA;
            --green:     #12A150;
            --green-soft:#E6F7EE;
            --amber:     #D97706;
            --amber-soft:#FEF3C7;
            --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,22,35,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,22,35,0.04);
            --shadow:    0 4px 12px rgba(15,22,35,0.08), 0 2px 4px rgba(15,22,35,0.04);
            --shadow-lg: 0 12px 40px rgba(15,22,35,0.1), 0 4px 12px rgba(15,22,35,0.06);
            --radius:    12px;
            --radius-lg: 18px;
            --radius-xl: 24px;
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       RESET & BASE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        *, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }

        body {
            font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg);
            color: var(--text);
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       LOADER
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #loader {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 99999;
            background: #fff;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 20px;
            transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
        }
        .loader-bar-track {
            width: 200px; height: 2px;
            background: var(--border); border-radius: 99px; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .loader-bar-fill {
            height: 100%; width: 0%; border-radius: 99px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--blue), var(--red));
            animation: loadBar 2.5s ease-out forwards;
        }
        @keyframes loadBar { to { width: 90%; } }
        #loader p {
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: var(--text3); text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       LOGIN SCREEN
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #login-overlay {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 9999;
            background: var(--bg);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            padding: 24px;
        }

        /* Decorative background grid */
        #login-overlay::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute; inset: 0;
            background-image:
                    linear-gradient(rgba(27,95,173,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
                    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(27,95,173,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 48px 48px;
            mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%, black 30%, transparent 100%);
        }

        /* Accent blobs */
        #login-overlay::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 600px; height: 600px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(27,95,173,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
            top: -100px; right: -100px; pointer-events: none;
        }

        .login-wrap {
            position: relative; z-index: 1;
            display: flex; align-items: stretch;
            gap: 0;
            background: var(--surface);
            border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg), 0 0 0 1px var(--border);
            overflow: hidden;
            max-width: 860px; width: 100%;
        }

        /* Left panel */
        .login-left {
            flex: 1; padding: 52px 44px;
            background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0F1E3D 0%, #1a2f5e 50%, #0d1a38 100%);
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative; overflow: hidden; min-width: 340px;
        }
        .login-left::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute; inset: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(204,31,38,0.18) 0%, transparent 60%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(27,95,173,0.25) 0%, transparent 60%);
        }
        .login-left-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

        .login-brand {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 48px;
        }
        .login-brand img { height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; }
        .login-brand-name {
            font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .login-brand-sub {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
            letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px;
        }

        .login-headline {
            font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
            line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .login-headline span {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7EAEE8, #E8909A);
            -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }
        .login-tagline {
            font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); line-height: 1.7;
            max-width: 280px;
        }

        .login-modules { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
        .login-module {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
            padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 10px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }
        .login-module:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); }
        .login-module-icon {
            width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px;
        }
        .login-module-name {
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }
        .login-module-desc { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); margin-top: 1px; }

        /* Right panel — form */
        .login-right {
            width: 360px; flex-shrink: 0;
            padding: 52px 44px;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
        }

        .login-form-header { margin-bottom: 36px; }
        .login-form-title {
            font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        .login-form-sub { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text3); }

        .lf { margin-bottom: 18px; }
        .lf label {
            display: block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--text2); margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .lf input {
            width: 100%; padding: 11px 14px; border-radius: 10px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px;
            outline: none; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .lf input:focus {
            border-color: var(--blue); background: #fff;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(27,95,173,0.1);
        }
        .lf input::placeholder { color: var(--text3); }

        .login-submit {
            width: 100%; padding: 13px; margin-top: 6px;
            border-radius: 10px; border: none; cursor: pointer;
            background: var(--text);
            color: #fff; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.18s; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .login-submit::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute; inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(27,95,173,0.9), rgba(204,31,38,0.9));
            opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s;
        }
        .login-submit:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
        .login-submit span { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
        .login-submit:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: var(--shadow); }
        .login-submit:active { transform: translateY(0); }

        .login-error {
            margin-top: 14px; padding: 11px 14px; border-radius: 8px;
            background: var(--red-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.2);
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--red);
            display: none;
        }

        .login-footer {
            margin-top: 32px; padding-top: 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
        }
        .login-footer-dot {
            width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green);
            animation: pulse2 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes pulse2 { 0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)} 50%{opacity:0.5;transform:scale(0.8)} }
        .login-footer-text { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       HEADER
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        header {
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 20px;
            background: var(--surface);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            height: 56px; flex-shrink: 0; z-index: 9999;
        }
        header.hidden { display: none; }

        .logo {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .logo img { height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; }
        .logo-name {
            font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text);
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        }
        .logo-divider {
            width: 1px; height: 16px; background: var(--border2); margin: 0 4px;
        }
        .logo-context {
            font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text3);
        }

        /* Nav tabs */
        .nav-tabs {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px;
            background: var(--surface2); padding: 3px; border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .nav-tab {
            padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.03em; color: var(--text3);
            background: transparent; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .nav-tab:hover:not(.active) { color: var(--text2); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.03); }
        .nav-tab.active {
            background: var(--surface); color: var(--text);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        /* Header right */
        .header-right {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .header-status {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
            font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3);
        }
        .header-status-dot {
            width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green);
            animation: pulse2 2s infinite;
        }
        .header-user {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
            padding: 4px 10px 4px 4px; border-radius: 20px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .header-avatar {
            width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--red));
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .header-uname { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
        .header-signout-btn {
            width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface2);
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            color: var(--text3); transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .header-signout-btn:hover { background: var(--red-soft); border-color: rgba(204,31,38,0.3); color: var(--red); }
        .header-signout-btn svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }
        .header-refresh-btn {
            width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface2);
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            color: var(--text3); transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .header-refresh-btn:hover { background: var(--blue-soft); border-color: rgba(27,95,173,0.3); color: var(--blue); }
        .header-refresh-btn svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }
        .header-refresh-btn.spinning svg { animation: spinRefresh 0.7s linear infinite; }
        @keyframes spinRefresh { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       PAGE SYSTEM
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        .page { display: none; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; flex-direction: column; }
        .page.active { display: flex; }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       MAP PAGE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        .main-content {
            display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden;
            padding: 12px 12px 0 12px; gap: 10px;
        }

        #sidebar {
            width: 180px; flex-shrink: 0;
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }
        .sidebar-title {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--text3); padding: 16px 16px 10px;
        }
        .sidebar-item {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
            padding: 9px 16px; cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s; border-left: 2px solid transparent;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .sidebar-item:hover { background: var(--surface2); }
        .sidebar-item.active { background: var(--blue-soft); border-left-color: var(--blue); }
        .sidebar-item.hidden-route { opacity: 0.35; }
        .sidebar-dot {
            width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .sidebar-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); flex: 1; }
        .sidebar-toggle {
            margin-left: auto; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%;
            border: 1.5px solid var(--border2);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 9px; color: var(--text3); transition: all 0.15s; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .sidebar-item.active .sidebar-toggle {
            border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); background: rgba(27,95,173,0.1);
        }
        .sidebar-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 4px 12px; }
        .sidebar-stops-count { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 1px; }

        #map {
            flex: 1; min-width: 0; z-index: 1;
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg); overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }
        .leaflet-container { background: #eef1f5 !important; border-radius: var(--radius-lg); }

        .custom-tooltip {
            background: var(--surface) !important;
            border: 1px solid var(--border) !important;
            border-radius: 10px !important; color: var(--text) !important;
            font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif !important;
            font-size: 12px !important; padding: 10px 14px !important;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow) !important; min-width: 160px;
        }
        .custom-tooltip::before { display: none !important; }
        .tt-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .tt-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; color: var(--text3); font-size: 11px; margin-top: 3px; }
        .tt-row span:last-child { color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; }
        .route-tooltip {
            background: var(--surface) !important; border: 1px solid var(--border) !important;
            border-radius: 8px !important; color: var(--text) !important;
            font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif !important; font-size: 11px !important;
            padding: 6px 10px !important; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm) !important;
        }
        .route-tooltip::before { display: none !important; }

        /* Stats bar */
        #stats {
            display: flex; gap: 0; flex-shrink: 0;
            margin: 10px 12px 12px; border-radius: var(--radius);
            background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); overflow: hidden;
        }
        .stat {
            flex: 1; padding: 12px 20px;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px;
        }
        .stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
        .stat-label {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3);
        }
        .stat-value {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px;
            color: var(--text);
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       ANALYTICS PAGE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #analytics-page { display: none; flex: 1; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; }
        #analytics-page.active { display: flex; }

        .analytics-layout {
            display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden;
            padding: 12px; gap: 10px;
        }

        .analytics-sidebar {
            width: 220px; flex-shrink: 0;
            background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg); display: flex;
            flex-direction: column; overflow-y: auto;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }
        .analytics-sidebar-title {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text3); padding: 16px 16px 10px;
        }
        .analytics-user-badge {
            margin: 0 10px 12px; background: var(--surface2);
            border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 12px;
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .analytics-user-avatar {
            width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--red));
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .analytics-user-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
        .analytics-user-role { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); }

        .route-selector-item {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 14px;
            cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; border-left: 2px solid transparent;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .route-selector-item:hover { background: var(--surface2); }
        .route-selector-item.selected { background: var(--blue-soft); border-left-color: var(--blue); }
        .route-selector-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .route-selector-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); }
        .route-selector-pax { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 1px; }

        .logout-btn {
            margin: 12px; padding: 9px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
            background: var(--surface2); color: var(--text3); font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s;
            margin-top: auto; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .logout-btn:hover { background: var(--red-soft); border-color: rgba(204,31,38,0.3); color: var(--red); }

        .analytics-main {
            flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 24px;
            background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        .analytics-route-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .analytics-route-color-bar { width: 4px; height: 44px; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .analytics-route-name { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
        .analytics-route-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 3px; }

        /* KPI Cards */
        .kpi-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        .kpi-card {
            background: var(--surface2); border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 18px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .kpi-label {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3); margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .kpi-value {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 26px; color: var(--text);
        }
        .kpi-sub { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 4px; }
        .kpi-bar { height: 2px; border-radius: 99px; margin-top: 12px; background: var(--border); overflow: hidden; }
        .kpi-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 99px; }

        /* Charts */
        .charts-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .chart-card {
            background: var(--surface2); border-radius: var(--radius);
            padding: 18px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .chart-card-full { grid-column: 1/-1; }
        .chart-title {
            font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text2);
            margin-bottom: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        canvas { max-height: 200px; }

        /* Stops table */
        .stops-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
        .stops-table th {
            text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: var(--text3); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .stops-table td {
            padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .stops-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
        .stops-table tr:hover td { background: var(--surface2); }
        .stop-index {
            width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%;
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
        }
        .stop-name-cell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
        .pax-bar-cell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
        .pax-mini-bar { flex: 1; height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 99px; overflow: hidden; max-width: 80px; }
        .pax-mini-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 99px; }

        /* Route comparison table */
        .route-comparison-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
        .route-comparison-table th {
            text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            color: var(--text3); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .route-comparison-table td {
            padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .route-comparison-table tr:hover td { background: var(--surface2); }
        .route-comparison-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
        .route-name-cell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
        .route-color-pill { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .pax-bar-overview { flex: 1; height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 99px; overflow: hidden; max-width: 100px; }
        .rank-badge {
            width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%;
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
        }

        /* Empty / loading states */
        .analytics-empty {
            flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px;
            color: var(--text3); text-align: center;
        }
        .analytics-empty-icon { font-size: 40px; opacity: 0.3; }
        .analytics-empty-text { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text2); }
        .analytics-empty-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); }

        /* Overview */
        .overview-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .overview-title { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
        .overview-subtitle { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text3); margin-top: 3px; }
        .overview-icon {
            width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--red));
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
       PASSENGERS PAGE
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        #passengers-page { display: none; flex: 1; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; }
        #passengers-page.active { display: flex; }

        .pass-layout { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px; gap: 10px; }

        .pass-sidebar {
            width: 200px; flex-shrink: 0;
            background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg); display: flex;
            flex-direction: column; overflow-y: auto;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        .pass-main {
            flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 24px;
            background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
        }

        .pass-toolbar {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 18px; flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .pass-search-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1; min-width: 200px; }
        .pass-search-wrap input {
            width: 100%; padding: 9px 14px 9px 36px; border-radius: 9px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px;
            outline: none; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .pass-search-wrap input:focus { border-color: var(--blue); background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(27,95,173,0.08); }
        .pass-search-wrap input::placeholder { color: var(--text3); }
        .pass-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 11px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text3); font-size: 14px; pointer-events: none; }
        .pass-filter-select {
            padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 9px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px;
            outline: none; cursor: pointer; min-width: 130px; transition: all 0.18s;
        }
        .pass-filter-select:focus { border-color: var(--blue); }
        .pass-count-badge {
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text3); font-size: 12px; padding: 6px 12px;
            border-radius: 8px; white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .pass-count-badge strong { color: var(--text); }

        /* KPI strip */
        .pass-kpi-strip { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
        .pass-kpi {
            background: var(--surface2); border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 16px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .pass-kpi-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3); margin-bottom: 5px; }
        .pass-kpi-value { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 22px; color: var(--text); }

        /* Table */
        .pass-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .pass-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; min-width: 560px; }
        .pass-table th {
            text-align: left; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3);
            background: var(--surface2); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 2;
        }
        .pass-table th:first-child { border-radius: 10px 0 0 0; }
        .pass-table th:last-child  { border-radius: 0 10px 0 0; }
        .pass-table td {
            padding: 11px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface);
        }
        .pass-table tr:hover td { background: var(--surface2); }
        .pass-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }

        .pass-id-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--blue-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(27,95,173,0.2);
            color: var(--blue); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-weight: 500; font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 9px;
            border-radius: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
        }
        .pass-dept-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--red-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(204,31,38,0.2);
            color: var(--red); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
            padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px;
        }
        .pass-shift-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--green-soft); border: 1px solid rgba(18,161,80,0.2);
            color: var(--green); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
            padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px;
        }
        .pass-no-results {
            text-align: center; padding: 48px 24px; color: var(--text3); font-size: 14px;
            background: var(--surface2); border-radius: 8px; margin-top: 4px;
        }

        /* ── SHIFT MULTI-SELECT FILTER ─────────────────────────────── */
        .shift-filter-wrap {
            position: relative;
        }
        .shift-filter-btn {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
            padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 9px;
            background: var(--surface2); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: all 0.18s;
            min-width: 150px; justify-content: space-between;
        }
        .shift-filter-btn:hover { border-color: var(--blue); background: #fff; }
        .shift-filter-btn.active { border-color: var(--blue); background: var(--blue-soft); color: var(--blue); }
        .shift-filter-btn .shift-filter-arrow { font-size: 9px; transition: transform 0.2s; }
        .shift-filter-btn.open .shift-filter-arrow { transform: rotate(180deg); }
        .shift-filter-badge {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            min-width: 18px; height: 18px; padding: 0 5px;
            background: var(--blue); color: #fff;
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 99px;
        }
        .shift-dropdown {
            position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 6px); left: 0; z-index: 999;
            background: var(--surface); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
            min-width: 220px; padding: 8px 0;
            display: none;
        }
        .shift-dropdown.open { display: block; animation: fadeDown 0.15s ease; }
        @keyframes fadeDown { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-6px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
        .shift-dropdown-header {
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 6px 14px 10px;
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text3);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        .shift-dropdown-header button {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--blue);
